notes: Eval 1 (full-audit): with_skill 5/5 PASS vs baseline 1/5 PASS. Skill provides structured output (scope-map, baseline scores, priority matrix, gate decision) that baseline lacks.
Eval 2 (scoped-audit): Both 3/3 PASS. Scoped scenarios are simpler and don't differentiate as strongly.
with_skill uses more tokens (+14K) but finishes faster (-59s) due to structured guidance reducing unnecessary exploration.
Baseline found unique items: 35+MB binary files tracked in git (CRITICAL), timestamp JSON history churn. Audit-loop prompts could be enhanced to include repo health diagnostics.
